app_id.description: The app the pipeline version belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the pipeline version belongs to.

description.title: Short description about this pipeline version

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata, use a struct field
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto

modified_at.title: When the pipeline was last modified

config.title: Pipeline version configuration including step secrets
